team_name: Explainable AI System for Tender Eligibility Evaluation with Evidence-Linked Decision Support
summary: Design an AI system for tender eligibility evaluation, focusing on explainable, evidence-backed decision-making. The system extracts eligibility criteria from tender documents, parses bidder submissions across formats, evaluates each bidder at a criterion level, and links every verdict to the exact source evidence and reasoning. It also flags uncertain or conflicting cases for human review.
key_steps: Extract eligibility criteria from tender documents
Evaluate each bidder at a criterion level
Link verdicts to exact source evidence and reasoning
Flag uncertain or conflicting cases for human review
optimization_claims: Suitable for real-world government procurement workflows
